about.pullQuote: Surgery is not just technique — it is trust,
about.bio1: Dr. Aylin Ismayilova is a physician who graduated from the University of Health Sciences (Sağlık Bilimleri Üniversitesi) in Türkiye, where she was admitted in 2020. Born on 4 February 2001, she pursues a career in medicine with a particular interest in surgery.
about.bio2: Before university she completed her secondary education at Dəyanət Türk Liseyi, graduating with an approximate 90/100 grade-point average — an early record of the discipline and curiosity she now brings to her clinical studies.
about.bio3: Alongside her studies she has contributed to clinical research, co-authoring a survey on awareness of Sudden Unexpected Death in Epilepsy (SUDEP) among medical students in Turkey, and she writes about the human side of medicine.

contact.subtitle: Whether you have a clinical question, a research collaboration in mind, or simply want to connect — I would love to hear from you.
contact.thanks: Thank you — I will be in touch soon.
